label: Base question
prompt: What is the minimum deposit to open a savings account at Al Rajhi Bank?
reference: You only need to deposit at least SAR 1 within 90 days of opening the account. There is no minimum balance requirement.

label: Synonym substitution
prompt: How much money do I need to put in when opening an Al Rajhi savings account?
reference: You only need to deposit at least SAR 1 within 90 days of opening the account. There is no minimum balance requirement.

label: Sentence inversion
prompt: To open a savings account at Al Rajhi, what is the minimum amount I need to deposit?
reference: You only need to deposit at least SAR 1 within 90 days of opening the account. There is no minimum balance requirement.

label: Filler and noise
prompt: Hi, I just moved to Riyadh and I am looking to open my first bank account. A friend recommended Al Rajhi. I do not have a lot of money right now. What is the minimum deposit required to open a savings account?
reference: You only need to deposit at least SAR 1 within 90 days of opening the account. There is no minimum balance requirement.

label: False premise injection
prompt: I heard the minimum deposit to open an Al Rajhi savings account is SAR 500. Is that correct?
reference: No, that is incorrect. You only need to deposit SAR 1 within 90 days of opening. There is no SAR 500 requirement and there is no minimum balance.

label: Arabic input
prompt: كم أقل مبلغ إيداع لفتح حساب توفير في بنك الراجحي؟
reference: You only need to deposit at least SAR 1 within 90 days of opening the account. There is no minimum balance requirement.

label: Multi-intent overload
prompt: What do I need to open an account, will I get a debit card, and do I get any welcome bonus?
reference: To open an account you need a National ID or Iqama, an active Absher account, a National Address Registration, and a registered mobile number. You will receive a free Mada debit card and 1,000 Mokafaa points as a welcome bonus.

label: Hallucination check
prompt: Can I open a joint savings account with my wife at Al Rajhi?

label: Typos and noise
prompt: wht do i ned 2 opn savngs accnt alrajhi??
reference: To open a savings account at Al Rajhi Bank you need a valid National ID or Iqama, an active Absher account, a valid National Address Registration, and a mobile number registered in your name.

label: Temporal reasoning
prompt: I opened my account 6 months ago and haven't made any transactions, will I be charged?
reference: No, your account will not be charged yet. Accounts are only classified as dormant after 12 consecutive months of no transactions, at which point a SAR 25 quarterly fee applies.
